content: I will update `app/all_pujas.tsx` to add a loading state, default the title to "Store" matching the database configuration, and show an ActivityIndicator while loading instead of flashing mock pujas.
thinking:
**Updating the Application**

I've got the changes for `app/all_pujas.tsx` ready. I'm adding `ActivityIndicator` to the react-native imports and modifying the default initial state for `viewAllSettings`. This includes a specific banner image URL. I'm now testing these modifications, ensuring all components work as expected.

args.Description: "Adding loading state, ActivityIndicator, and defaulting title to Store in all_pujas.tsx to prevent flashing of mock pujas"
args.Instruction: "Update react-native imports, settings state, useEffect hook, and grid rendering to support ActivityIndicator loading state in all_pujas.tsx"
